name: testingnew
demographic_description:
Digital Nomad Solo-Founder: High-agency tech entrepreneurs aged 24–35 who prioritize location independence and rapid product iteration.
This demographic consists of lean "build-in-public" creators who manage complex workflows solo, value tools that integrate via API or Zapier, and are willing to pay a premium for AI that automates 10+ hours of manual research or community engagement per week.
